title: Letters Of Effection
description: Made for ModFest 26, a mod adding in Letters to Minecraft acting like smaller Book and Quills (Very Unfinished)
body:
# Letters of Effection: Release 1.2

This mod was my attempt to join ModFest 26: Animation, Affection, & Academia. The concept was to add letters that could be laced with different effects through flowers, however due to schedule conflicts and motivation, it ended up just as a Love Letter mod. Use Blank Letters to write a quick note, before sealing it up and sending it away!

![Blank Letter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3lmd1o0a/images/adfe7937e5a1b21cc2c74d49392e4278f122eba2.png)

[![Made for ModFest 26](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/26/compact.svg)](https://modfest.net/26)
